homepage.hero-description: Order what you like from your favorite websites or shop our products with immediate availability.

faqs-section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs-section.description: If you have more questions, contact us
faqs-section.question-1: Do you offer personal delivery in Maracay?
faqs-section.answer-1: Yes, we offer personal deliveries in central areas of Maracay. We also provide pick-up and delivery.
faqs-section.answer-2: Yes! We ship throughout Venezuela through the agency of your choice (MRW, Zoom, Tealca, or Liberty Express) with payment due on delivery.
faqs-section.question-3: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs-section.answer-3: We accept mobile payment, bank transfers, cash (Maracay only), Zelle, PayPal, Zinli, and Binance (USDT).
faqs-section.question-4: Can I order something that is not in the catalog?
faqs-section.answer-4: Absolutely! We offer a personal shopper service for custom import requests. If you saw something on Amazon, SHEIN, or any international store, send us the link and we will handle the rest.
faqs-section.answer-5: Yes. For both custom orders and in-stock products, you can place your order with a 50% deposit and pay the rest before delivery or shipping.

footer.slogan: Buy, pay, and sell in Venezuela

LocaleLayout.title: Nix Store | Online Shopping & Custom Orders in Venezuela
LocaleLayout.description: Your trusted online store in Venezuela. Shop available products or place custom international orders with ease and security.
